title: mentha pulegium subsp. gibraltarica
intro: Mentha pulegium subsp. gibraltarica, also known as Gibraltar water mint or Spanish mint, is a subspecies of the water mint plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, thanks to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentha pulegium subsp. gibraltarica include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
